announcement.goals.kinswathe.cook: See players that eat through walls!
tip.kinswathe.dreamer.imprint: %s has left a mark on you
tip.kinswathe.drugmaker.poison_failed: It seems to be immune to poisoning...
announcement.goals.kinswathe.hunter: Enjoy your prey to the fullest!
announcement.goals.kinswathe.kidnapper: Kidnap passenger to a concealed corner.
tip.kinswathe.kidnapper.daze_failed: It seems to be immune to dazing...
announcement.goals.kinswathe.licensed_vi: You might still retain a shred of conscience...
game.win.kinswathe.licensed_villain: The licensed villain ended everyone's life!
announcement.goals.kinswathe.physician: See poisoned players through walls and treat them.
announcement.goals.kinswathe.robot: A machine devoid of any emotion.
item.kinswathe.blowgun.tooltip:
Point, right-click and shoot
Target that be shooted will be poisoned
1 minute cooldown
item.kinswathe.dream_imprint.tooltip:
Use on a player to protect one extra hit of life
Target will teleport to user if it dies and give a delusion count
Single use
item.kinswathe.hunting_knife.tooltip:
Right-click, hold for a second and get close to your victim
Compared to Knife, it has a longer holding-time
If stop holding after sprinting, two times holding-time cooldown
After a kill, cannot be used for 45 seconds
Attack to knock back / push a player (no cooldown)
item.kinswathe.knockout_drug.tooltip:
Use on a player to daze it for 20 seconds
The affected player will follow you
Use sneaking key to release it
Single use, 45 seconds cooldown
item.kinswathe.medical_kit.tooltip:
Use on a player to remove poison
1 minute cooldown
item.kinswathe.pan.tooltip:
Right-click, hold for a second and stun target for 5 seconds
If shot during holding, destroy pan to protects player one extra hit of life
45 seconds cooldown
item.kinswathe.pill.tooltip:
Right-click to eat
Protects player one extra hit of life
Single use, 2 minute cooldown
item.kinswathe.poison_injector.tooltip:
Use on a player to poison it
If target have been poisoned, directly cause death
1 minute cooldown
item.kinswathe.sulfuric_acid_barrel.tool:
Use on a dead body to dissolve it
1 minute cooldown
guidebook.role.description.kinswathe:bel:
Bellringer holds the secrets of time aboard the train, able to hear the sound of time flowing.

Bellringer is always aware of the remaining round time. They gain 50 coins for each task completed.

Every so often, Bellringer can ring the time bell, reducing the remaining time by 1 minute.

Some say Bellringer just wants to reach the destination early, while others speculate they have other motives...
guidebook.role.description.kinswathe:cle:
Cleaner is a cleanup specialist sent by the killer organization.

They start with a Sulfuric Acid Barrel, which can be used on a dead body to dissolve it, leaving no trace.

Every so often, Cleaner can clear all dropped items on the ground.

For Killers, Cleaner is the most reliable partner—after all, no body means no evidence.
guidebook.role.description.kinswathe:coo:
The most popular person on the train—after all, who doesn't want a hot meal during their journey?

Cook gains 50 coins for each task completed, and also automatically receives 5 coins in tips every minute.

A Pan can be used not only for cooking but also as a weapon and shield in critical moments.

When a passenger consumes food, Cook can briefly see their location through walls.

Remember, Cook is just an ordinary person. Don't chase Killers with a Pan...
guidebook.role.description.kinswathe:det:
Detective didn't board this train by chance—they received an anonymous letter hinting that a murder would occur on this journey.

Detective gains 50 coins for each task completed. Every so often, they can use their ability to determine whether a target is innocent.

But Detective cannot directly identify Killers—their ability only tells them who is innocent. The rest requires their own deduction...
guidebook.role.description.kinswathe:dre:
Dreamer walks between reality and illusion.

They start with a Dream Imprint, which can be used on a target. The marked target will take one extra hit of life.

When a marked target takes damage, they teleport back to Dreamer and grant Dreamer one delusion count.

When enough non-Killer players have been deluded, Dreamer becomes a Killer.

For Dreamer, reality is just a dream that can be rewritten.
guidebook.role.description.kinswathe:dru:
Drugmaker is the Killer most skilled in using poison, savoring every second of their prey's struggle.

Drugmaker can see poisoned players through walls—after all, they are their masterpieces.

At the shop, they can purchase Poison Injectors and Blowguns.

For Drugmaker, death is just a prescription away.
guidebook.role.description.kinswathe:hun:
Hunter is born to chase, relishing the thrill of prey fleeing yet finding no escape.

When sprinting while holding a Hunting Knife, Hunter's movement speed greatly increases.

Every so often, Hunter can use their ability to instantly refresh the Hunting Knife's cooldown.

For Hunter, escaping only fuels their hunting desire.
guidebook.role.description.kinswathe:jud:
Judge boarded this train purely for vacation, but their innate sense of justice won't let them turn a blind eye to evil.

Judge gains 50 coins for each task completed, and also receives 5 coins every minute.

Every so often, Judge can use their ability to make a target glow.

Some say those marked by Judge will eventually face justice, but others worry whether Judge's verdicts are truly fair...
guidebook.role.description.kinswathe:kid:
Kidnapper doesn't kill openly—they prefer to turn prey into obedient puppets.

At the shop, they can purchase Knockout Drug. They also start with one.

Affected players will black out, unable to attack or use items, and will follow Kidnapper until the effect ends.

No one knows where Kidnapper takes these passengers, and no one wants to know.
guidebook.role.description.kinswathe:lic:
Licensed Villain holds an officially certified villain license.

Licensed Villain's win condition is unique—they must kill all players to win.

Licensed Villain has 15 seconds of sprint time and gains 50 coins for each task completed.

For them, everyone is just a target waiting to be eliminated.
guidebook.role.description.kinswathe:phy:
Physician is the most trustworthy person on the train, having sworn to heal the sick and injured.

Physician has a keen sense of smell, able to see poisoned passengers through walls.

They start with a Medical Kit. Using it to detoxify a player or completing a task earns 50 coins.

At the shop, they can purchase Pills, which allow them to withstand one extra attack.
guidebook.role.description.kinswathe:rob:
Robot has infiltrated this train—no one knows its purpose.

As a mechanical construct, it has no sanity, is immune to poison and knockout drugs, and has unlimited stamina.

Every so often, Robot can see clearly even in darkness.

Some say it's just malfunctioning, while others believe it carries some kind of mission...
guidebook.role.description.kinswathe:mag:
Magnate is the person with the most money on the train, their pockets always full of endless coins.

Magnate's passive income is twice that of other roles.
guidebook.role.description.kinswathe:tas:
Taskmaster believes that hard work pays off—their income is tied to tasks.

If Taskmaster is a Killer, they gain 50 coins per task completed.

If they are a non-Killer, they gain an additional 25 coins per task completed.
guidebook.role.description.kinswathe:vio:
Violator breaks the most basic rule of the train—they can jump during the game.

No one knows why they can jump, or what other rules they might break...
